summary: Two wave 11 quarantined sources touch the owned writer shard and were deferred from prose.

summary: Wave 11 manifest reports 38 in-scope identity-review suggestions, all parse errors, so identity decisions were not applied in this Codex-only pass.
details: The task forbids provider-backed identity-review-run, campaign dedup, canonicalize, and related commands. Duplicate or ambiguous identities observed in the wave 11 Woodhaven/M79/Bx6 area should remain review-note backlog rather than manual prose claims or unreviewed canonical edits.

summary: Woodhaven/Cross Bay SBS has several nearby project and corridor records that look like unresolved identity or scope candidates.
details: Canonical records include project_woodhaven-cross-bay-sbs plus nearby records such as project_woodhaven-cross-bay-sbs-spring2015 and project_woodhaven-cross-bay-sbs-cb14-2015, and corridor records such as corridor_woodhaven-cross-bay-blvds and corridor_woodhaven-cross-bay-blvd-cac5.
